narrative_votes_with_evidence.evidence_quote: amerikans are the greatest pigs on the planet…and that is in the most derogitive term you can imagine.. absolute pigs
narrative_votes_with_evidence.reasoning: This direct quote is a severe and derogatory criticism of Western (specifically American) society, portraying it as morally corrupt and inferior, which aligns with the narrative of discrediting the West.

narrative_votes_with_evidence.evidence_quote: Sadly the western media is framing the war as if Russia is losing which only prolongs negotiations and causes more death.
narrative_votes_with_evidence.reasoning: This statement directly accuses Western media of presenting a false narrative about the war's progress, thereby undermining its reliability and integrity, which is the core of the 'Distrust towards Media' narrative.

narrative_votes_with_evidence.evidence_quote: lets get on with a full nuke war…wipe us all out …at least it (for most) will be over quickly
narrative_votes_with_evidence.reasoning: This quote explicitly invokes the fear of a full-scale nuclear war and presents it as an almost desirable, imminent outcome, which is designed to elicit severe anxiety about catastrophic consequences.

narrative_votes_with_evidence.evidence_quote: Russia is Winning, Nuclear Threat is a Sign of Desperation & Very Serious
narrative_votes_with_evidence.reasoning: The title and premise of the discussion explicitly predict a specific war outcome (Russia winning) and speculate on the meaning and seriousness of the nuclear threat, fitting the definition of speculating on war outcomes.

narrative_votes_with_evidence.narrative_name: URW: Negative Consequences for the West
narrative_votes_with_evidence.evidence_quote: we deserve EVERYTHING we get
narrative_votes_with_evidence.reasoning: This statement, in the context of the preceding text blaming Western governments and populations, implies that negative consequences (presumably from the conflict) are deserved and will befall the West, highlighting adverse outcomes.

narrative_votes_with_evidence.evidence_quote: for the west it’s always been the soviet (RUSSIAN) that has ALWAYS been the boogie man..when in fact they were SELDOM a threat.. amerika always blew any comment about RUSSIA or at later stages CHINA way out of proportion.. and you are still doing
narrative_votes_with_evidence.reasoning: This quote directly criticizes Western (specifically American) foreign policy and perception, portraying it as hysterical, exaggerated, and fundamentally dishonest in its portrayal of Russia as a threat.

narrative_votes_with_evidence.narrative_name: URW: Negative Consequences for the West
narrative_votes_with_evidence.evidence_quote: lets get on with a full nuke war…wipe us all out …at least it (for most) will be over quickly and no more of month after month of promises from Trump or threats from the east….POOF..it’s all over …thanks mostly to un-elected bureaucrats in all “western countries” they are proving the worst of the worst of humanity
narrative_votes_with_evidence.reasoning: The text predicts and seemingly advocates for a catastrophic nuclear war as a consequence of Western political actions, framing it as an inevitable negative outcome brought about by Western 'un-elected bureaucrats.'

narrative_votes_with_evidence.evidence_quote: Will they resort to nuclear weapons to even out the war?
narrative_votes_with_evidence.reasoning: This question, posed in the introductory text, directly evokes fear and anxiety about the potential for nuclear escalation, which is a core tactic of amplifying war-related fears.

narrative_votes_with_evidence.evidence_quote: Sadly the western media is framing the war as if Russia is losing which only prolongs negotiations and causes more death.
narrative_votes_with_evidence.reasoning: This statement explicitly questions the reliability and motives of Western media, accusing it of deceptive framing that leads to negative real-world consequences, thereby undermining trust in media sources.
